findings.title: No pre-commit hooks, CODEOWNERS, or GitHub Actions exist despite being referenced as enforced controls
Sprint SPRINT-2026-05-A ends today but repo has had zero updates since initial scaffold
ENV.md missing Stripe and Documenso secret_refs that INTEGRATIONS.md declares
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md declares STRIPE_* and DOCUMENSO_API_KEY secrets but ENV.md has no rows for them. Rotation calendar and scope guidance are missing.
findings.fix_sketch: Add rows for STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, DOCUMENSO_API_KEY to ENV.md.

findings.title: ADR-0006 contains lazy 'NG-something equivalent' placeholder not resolved
findings.detail: docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md line 42 references 'NON_GOALS.md NG-something equivalent' as a placeholder that was never resolved in this accepted ADR.
findings.fix_sketch: Add erratum note at bottom of ADR clarifying the reference is SPRINT.md §No-gos item 5.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' section only covers 6 of 10 No-Gos from NON_GOALS.md
findings.detail: NON_GOALS.md defines 10 No-Gos; ROADMAP.md 'Not Doing' lists only 6, missing NoGo-5, -7, -8, -9, -10.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace ROADMAP Not Doing section with a pointer to NON_GOALS.md as canonical source.

findings.title: README.md references stale IFleet status memory file (2026-05-13) missing the 2026-05-19 launch
findings.detail: README.md points to a 6-day-old status memory file that predates IFleet's launch. For a coordination repo, this is actively misleading.
findings.fix_sketch: Update README to reference project_status_20260519.md or replace with MEMORY.md index pointer.

findings.title: SECURITY.md security.txt references TBD URLs that will break RFC 9116 compliance
findings.detail: SECURITY.md contains TBD URLs for PGP key and security policy that would be invalid per RFC 9116 if mirrored to /.well-known/security.txt.
findings.fix_sketch: Verify security@ email, populate or remove TBD URLs, verify Retell and Hostinger status URLs.

findings.title: costs.json misleadingly references IFleet PR #39 as cost tracker for a cross-repo write
findings.detail: The costs.json notes claim IFleet PR #39 writes to Factory's costs.json, but no cross-repo mechanism exists for this.
findings.fix_sketch: Clarify that Factory's costs.json tracks only Factory Claude sessions; remove the PR #39 cross-repo reference.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md ADR-0010 missing from Decisions subsection
findings.detail: Finding was raised 2026-05-21; upon re-inspection on 2026-05-24, ADR-0010 IS present at line 40 of CHANGELOG.md. Finding was a false positive.
findings.fix_sketch: No change needed — ADR-0010 already present in CHANGELOG.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' duplicates the same No-Go in two differently-worded bullets
findings.detail: Lines 268 and 272 both express NoGo-1 with different wording.
findings.fix_sketch: Merge into one bullet citing NON_GOALS.md as canonical source.

findings.title: README.md target operational date is past and milestone was not met
findings.detail: README.md stated 'Target operational date: end of Day 5 (2026-05-20)'. SPRINT-2026-05-A was incomplete. Updated to reflect missed target and revised status.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated to note original target missed and revised target pending SPRINT-2026-05-B.

findings.title: SECURITY.md Protected Paths missing ROADMAP.md and DECISIONS.md
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md is parsed by Decomposer for [M-NNN] format; DECISIONS.md is the ADR index. Both were unprotected. Added both to Protected Paths glob list.
findings.fix_sketch: Added ROADMAP.md and DECISIONS.md to Protected Paths in SECURITY.md with rationale comments.

findings.title: RUNBOOK.md references undefined terms Rule of Two, SLO, SLI
findings.detail: RUNBOOK.md used Rule of Two, SLO, and SLI without defining them. Added Definitions section before Trigger rules.
findings.fix_sketch: Added Definitions section with SLI, SLO, and Rule of two definitions.

findings.title: Inconsistent voice agent terminology across spec files
findings.detail: Files used 'voice interviewer', 'voice agent', 'voice-discovery agent' interchangeably. Added canonical 'Voice Interviewer Agent' definition to UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.
findings.fix_sketch: Added Voice Interviewer Agent entry to UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md after Voice Discovery section.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md declares itself auto-generated but is manually maintained with no enforcement
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md states it is auto-generated by CI but M-002 is not yet shipped. Without a pre-commit hook it will drift from actual ADR files.
findings.fix_sketch: Add pre-commit hook validating DECISIONS.md matches docs/decisions/*.md frontmatter, or clarify manual status.

findings.title: KPI.md OKR due dates are stale after SPRINT-2026-05-A failure
findings.detail: KR1 due 2026-05-20 failed; KR2 and beyond need date revision. OKRs show missed targets with no post-mortem.
findings.fix_sketch: Document KR1 as failed and revise KR2-KR4 due dates accordingly with post-mortem note.

findings.title: INTEGRATIONS.md n8n status page is TBD with no health-check runbook
findings.detail: n8n handles critical Retell→Supabase webhook. Status page URL is TBD. No alert or detection mechanism documented for outages.
findings.fix_sketch: Set up n8n monitoring before M-005, add n8n-down scenario to RUNBOOK.md, update INTEGRATIONS.md with confirmed URL.

findings.title: External memory links ([[...]]) reference files not in version control
findings.detail: ADRs and STAKEHOLDERS.md reference [[ifleet-repo]], [[project-status-20260513]], [[searxng-mcp]] which are only on Sebastian's local machine, inaccessible to other team members or CI.
findings.fix_sketch: Create memory/ folder with decision-context.md summarizing essential referenced context, or inline summaries in ADRs.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md Unreleased section has no structured Added/Changed/Removed entries
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md has SemVer rules but the [Unreleased] section is missing the full Keep a Changelog structure.
findings.fix_sketch: Add proper Added/Changed/Removed structure to [Unreleased] as work ships.

findings.title: ADR-0001 verification steps marked accepted without evidence of completion
findings.detail: ADR-0001 is marked accepted but the verification step ('Verify Claude Code session reads AGENTS.md') has no completion record.
findings.fix_sketch: Add verification date and outcome to ADR-0001 Confirmation section.
